We've been sitting on this one for a while...

Introducing SBUHacks, a MLH certified, full fledged Hackathon that is open to ALL students and newly-graduated alumni, hosted right here at Stony Brook. The event is on November 7-9, so book your tickets and get ready! We offer three tracks - Student Experience, Interdisciplinary, and EquiTech - each with their own fabulous prizes, as well as an overall grand prize. More information can be found on our website, linked below, and feel free to ask any questions in the comments or on our discord!

 Check out the SBUHacks website, register for the event, and join our Discord with the link in the bio!

#sbu #sbcs #wics #hack #hackathon #computerscience #tech #newyork

caption:
Come to EXPLORING AI FRONTIERS: CAREERS & INNOVATIONS with NORTH ATLANTIC INDUSTRIES‼️ 

AIC is hosting this career event in collaboration with SBCS, IEEE, and AIAA 🤩

Gain firsthand insights from leading computer science and engineering experts as they share their experience and career advice in the rapidly evolving field of artificial intelligence. 💫 At this event you will learn how AI is transforming military and aerospace applications at NAI, discover actionable strategies to kickstart your career in AI, and get tips on how to leverage AI in your work. 🚀

We will wrap up the event with a Q&A session where you can get your most pressing questions answered by industry professionals. 💼 Don’t miss this opportunity to connect with experts and uncover the path to a successful career in AI! 🎉

REGISTER ON HANDSHAKE!
https://app.joinhandshake.com/edu/events/1627878

Time: Monday (11/4) 12:30pm-1:50pm ⏰ 
Location: Union Ballroom📍

✨Team SBCS wins HackHarvard 2024✨ 

#hackharvard #sbcomputingsociety #harvarduniversity #sbu

caption: SBCS GBM 2 in COLLAB with Pocket Theatre!!

No thoughts. No code. Just vibes. 

Come to our Vibe Coding workshop TOMORROW, September 3rd to learn how to code with pure vibes.

From Claude Code to Firebase, you'll learn how to make your very own apps without having to type a single semicolon!

Come to SAC 306 on September 3rd from 4:30-6:00pm and join the fun!
Thanks for coming out today 😌 We had so much fun meeting everybody at the CEAS involvement fair today and we can't wait to see you again at our first GBM!!!
